name: Cozy Desktop: Relaxing Weather and Atmosphere
short_description: Turn your computer into a relaxing and cozy safe place. Activate global weather effects such as rain, snow and falling leaves that play no matter what you are doing. Customize them to fit your preferences and your current mood! Light a comforting camp fire, collect friendly companions and more!
detailed_description:
Cozy Desktop is an application that helps you relax and create a nice, comforting cozy vibe while you use your computer.

Weather Effects

You can have various global weather effects that play on your computer no matter what you're doing. Whether it's playing a game, writing a paper, coding, or listening to music, you can play these weather effects to set the right mood. All weather effects are customizable, allowing you to adjust properties such as intensity, volume and other visual elements. Effects include Rain, Snow, Falling Leaves and a camp fire.

Keyboard/Mouse sounds

Choose from a variety of sounds to add to each mouse click or key press. (With adjustable volume)

Companions

Summon friendly companions that motivate you and hang out in the corner (can be disabled or moved to a different location). Catch and unlock new companions as they spawn every once in a while!
